data.title: Why Is Ocular Therapeutix (OCUL) Stock Up Premarket Today? Sanofi Bid Rejection Fuels Rally
data.description:
Ocular Therapeutix stock jumped over 18% in premarket trading after rejecting Sanofi’s $16 per share buyout offer, as investors turned bullish on the company’s late-stage pipeline.
source: https://tokenist.com/why-is-ocular-therapeutix-ocul-stock-up-premarket-today-sanofi-bid-rejection-fuels-rally/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=why-is-ocular-therapeutix-ocul-stock-up-premarket-today-sanofi-bid-rejection-fuels-rally

data.description:

data.title: OKX's "Flash Earn" product will launch Fogo (FOGO), offering a chance to share in 10 million FOGO airdrop rewards.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Flash Earn" product will list Fogo (FOGO) from 22:00 on January 15, 2026 to 22:00 on January 22, 2026 (UTC+8). During the event, users can participate in the subscription by locking OKB, USDG, BTC, or ETH to share a reward of 10,000,000 FOGO tokens. This event supports participation in multiple currencies. Users can access the event page through OKX App's top left corner—Earn & Rewards—Flash Earn.

data.title: An address minted over 100 million D coins, worth $1.286 million.
data.description: According to on-chain data, an address (0xae579C73...c90a47C9E) received 100,109,055.4 DAR Open Network (D) tokens today, minted and transferred from an empty address (Null: 0x000...000). According to CoinMarketCap real-time data, the maximum and total supply of D tokens are both set at 800 million. Prior to this large-scale minting, its circulating supply had reached 743 million, and its circulating market capitalization was extremely close to its fully diluted valuation (FDV). This minting action essentially brings the project to full circulation. Currently, these tokens are worth approximately $1.286 million at a price of $0.01286 each.

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer to FalconX Identified
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 20:19, a total of 149,999.9 SOL was transferred from an anonymous address, beginning with 34bHts, to FalconX.

data.title: South Korea to keep tracking U.S. Chip tariffs as industry uncertainty looms
data.description:
South Korea announced that it will continue to monitor U. S. AI chip tariffs and evaluate the industry's impacts.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-to-keep-tracking-u-s-chip/

data.title: Bybit has officially opened BYUSDT to retail investors, allowing them to "earn interest and trade" their funds.
data.description: Bybit has officially launched its BYUSDT product for retail users. BYUSDT is the tokenized form of the USDT flexible investment balance on the Bybit platform and can be used directly as margin for UTA trading at a 100% conversion rate (CVR). While continuously earning flexible investment returns, BYUSDT can also participate in trading, achieving "interest-bearing + trading" of funds and improving overall capital utilization efficiency.

data.title: Xie Jiayin: By 2025, Bitget will have airdropped a total of $142 million to users through various welfare mechanisms.
data.description: In his "2025 Annual Report" livestream, Bitget's Chinese-language head, Xie Jiayin, mentioned that Bitget always prioritizes user interests and continuously rewards users through a multi-tiered revenue matrix. In 2025, through activities such as VIP airdrops, Launchpool, PoolX, and CandyBomb, a total of $142 million in airdrop rewards were distributed to users. Furthermore, with the full opening of the TradFi section, its daily trading volume increased to $2 billion in a short period. In the next phase, Bitget will continue to expand its TradFi and US stock-related products to further enhance users' profit potential in multi-asset trading scenarios.

data.title: Strategy’s preferred 'STRC' drops below par after ex dividend date
data.description:
The preferred stock known as 'STRC,' which is part of Strategy's investment portfolio, has fallen in value and is now trading below its par value following the ex-dividend date, meaning that investors who buy the stock now will not receive the most recent dividend payment.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/01/15/strategy-s-preferred-strc-drops-below-par-after-ex-dividend-date

data.title: Decred (DCR) price soars amid treasury spending cap approval
data.description:
Decred price jumped over 40% in the past 24 hours to hit highs of $29. Several privacy coins are rallying. The approval of a proposal seeking to cap treasury expenditure has also catalysed gains
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/decred-dcr-price-soars-amid-treasury-spending-cap-approval/

data.title: BlackRock’s Q4 earnings shows best performance in its history, as AUM surpass $14 trillion
data.description:
BlackRock just closed out 2025 with $14. 04 trillion under management. That’s the biggest figure the company has ever recorded. It’s also the first time any asset manager has passed the $14 trillion mark. But while that number grabbed attention, profit actually dropped in the last three months of the year because of higher costs. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrocks-q4-earnings-aum-top-14-trillion/

data.title: BNB completed its 34th quarterly burn, destroying $1.277 billion worth of BNB.
data.description: According to official sources, the BNB Foundation has completed its first quarterly token burn in 2026, burning a total of 1,371,803.77 BNB (including 100.1 BNB for Vanguard), equivalent to approximately $1.277 billion at the time. This burn was completed automatically, with the goal of gradually reducing the total supply to 100 million BNB. The current total supply is 136 million BNB.

data.title: Bitmine staked another 154,300 ETH today, bringing its total staked ETH to 1.68 million.
data.description: Bitmine staked another 154,304 ETH today, bringing its total staked ETH to 1.68 million, worth $5.62 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Nasdaq Decline Contrasts with Russell 2000 Performance, Indicating Rising Risk Appetite
data.description: According to Odaily, Garrett Jin, known as '1011 Insider Whale,' shared insights on the X platform regarding recent market movements. He noted that while the Nasdaq index experienced a decline, the Russell 2000 index performed exceptionally well. This classic risk preference rotation suggests an increase in risk appetite, with funds continuing to flow into high-beta crypto assets. Both BTC and ETH are in an upward trend, with potential for further gains.
